name: VALHALL Tests
short_description: VALHALL - the place where the best warriors fight to the death. Now it’s time for one last battle. Ragnarök is coming!
detailed_description:
Be first to try the game and help the development


VALHALL is crowdfunded project in development process now.

Price will become higher with the development progress. It will not be changed for owners.

Currently VALHALL is in Pre-Beta stage. We are still working on some core elements and fixing bugs. The goal is a public launch of Wield Mjolnir game mode after completion of remaining features.

We are a small independent team working on achieving high quality standards, this is why schedule is fairly flexible. We share the progress with the patches updates, community Trello board, social media and in other ways.

Beta will be launched after the full Wield Mjolnir release and will include other modes.


About the Game

VALHALL — a Viking first & third person Hack & Slash game with a deep melee combat.

Dive in true viking atmosphere and immersive combat through diverse game modes across all 9 worlds of Norse mythology.

Current state

Pre-Beta - it doesn't provide experience intended for the full game.
At the moment we are testing different elements in one game mode - Wield Mjolnir. Not all the features are available now, they will be added with the development progress.

The tests are under NDA, it will be lifted closer to full Wield Mjolnir release.

You can follow the progress and interact with the process using our Community board, Trello and Discord polls.

You are one of the survivors from the last battle of Odin’s army.

Almost all your brothers lost their lives fighting against a tremendous enemy. Now an unprecedented apocalypse is going to crush everything in its way!

The best of Odin’s warriors have returned to retrieve the sword of Odin. It possesses power over all natural forces and is your last hope to stop Ragnarök.

You are going to have to fight against all others for the right to possess the sword and save the Nine Worlds from complete destruction.

Key Features:

  • The map is separated into 4 even parts, each with a different season and environment with dynamic weather and lighting systems.
  • Deep, fun, skill-based melee combat system. Feel in complete control of your actions with responsive combat and movement options.
  • You are able to play from first and third person perspectives.
  • The map is constantly crumbling away. A gravity field surrounds the map and shrinks further and further towards the center.
